channel.title: NPR Topics: Business
channel.description: Find the latest business news with reports on Wall Street, interest rates, banking, companies, and U.S. and world financial markets. Subscribe to the Business Story of the Day podcast.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Ask AI or just Google it? Google makes a big change to a little search box
item.description: The search giant is updating its famously minimalist homepage. But what looks like a tiny design change is a very big deal.
item.content:encoded:
The search giant is updating its famously minimalist homepage. But what looks like a tiny design change is a very big deal.

(Image credit: GLENN CHAPMAN/AFP via Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch

item.title: Shein buys Everlane, which sold millennials the dream of ethical, affordable luxury
item.description: Everlane's finances have faltered in recent years. But will the merger alienate Everlane's existing shoppers — or sway droves of Shein fans to trade up?
item.content:encoded:
Everlane's finances have faltered in recent years. But will the merger alienate Everlane's existing shoppers — or sway droves of Shein fans to trade up?

(Image credit: Smith Collection/Gado/Getty Images
)
item.dc:creator: Alina Selyukh

item.title: Drive slower, go electric, don't drive at all? The best options for saving gas
item.description: The national average for a gallon of gasoline is $4.55, as America heads into one of the busiest travel weekends of the year. What can you do to cut your costs?
item.content:encoded:
The national average for a gallon of gasoline is $4.55, as America heads into one of the busiest travel weekends of the year. What can you do to cut your costs?

(Image credit: Justin Sullivan)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: A trillion dollar question: Will SpaceX's Starship launch go well?
item.description: Ahead of a much anticipated IPO, SpaceX is carrying out a critical test of its giant, stainless steel rocket. Investors will be watching closely.
item.content:encoded:
Ahead of a much anticipated IPO, SpaceX is carrying out a critical test of its giant, stainless steel rocket. Investors will be watching closely.

(Image credit: Eric Gay)
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel

item.title: Walmart plans price cuts using tariff refunds as shoppers get skittish
item.description: Now that the U.S. government must refund most tariffs, Walmart says it might put its refund money toward lowering store prices. Executives say the cost of gas has shoppers increasingly under stress.
item.content:encoded:
Now that the U.S. government must refund most tariffs, Walmart says it might put its refund money toward lowering store prices. Executives say the cost of gas has shoppers increasingly under stress.

(Image credit: Will Newton)
item.dc:creator: Alina Selyukh

item.title: Spencer Pratt is 'winning the internet,' but can he become mayor of Los Angeles?
item.description: Pratt, a former reality TV star, is flooding social media with edgy humor, AI slop and combative rhetoric as a way of grabbing attention and winning the vote of the very online. It's a strategy some political experts see as the future of online campaigning.
item.content:encoded:
Pratt, a former reality TV star, is flooding social media with edgy humor, AI slop and combative rhetoric as a way of grabbing attention and winning the vote of the very online. It's a strategy some political experts see as the future of online campaigning.

(Image credit: Andy Kropa)
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn

item.title: EEOC wants to stop collecting data used to fight discrimination
item.description: Since 1966, companies have been required to send the federal government demographic data on their employees, part of an effort to combat discrimination. Under Trump, the data collection may end.
item.content:encoded: Since 1966, companies have been required to send the federal government demographic data on their employees, part of an effort to combat discrimination. Under Trump, the data collection may end.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO plans reveal blockbuster spending on rockets and AI
item.description: The company is on track to pull off the largest IPO in history — making CEO Elon Musk even wealthier.
item.content:encoded:
The company is on track to pull off the largest IPO in history — making CEO Elon Musk even wealthier.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: Maria Aspan

item.title: Meta slashes 8,000 jobs as it pivots towards AI
item.description: Facebook and Instagram's parent company has been investing huge sums of money in AI, but it lags behind competitors.
item.content:encoded:
Facebook and Instagram's parent company has been investing huge sums of money in AI, but it lags behind competitors.

(Image credit: Jeff Chiu)
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch

item.title: After the Kars4Kids ad is banned in California, we check in on nostalgic jingles past
item.description: A California judge has given Kars4Kids 30 days to either take its ads off the air or update them to disclose its affiliations to a Jewish charity based in the Northeast.
item.content:encoded: A California judge has given Kars4Kids 30 days to either take its ads off the air or update them to disclose its affiliations to a Jewish charity based in the Northeast.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman
